global.description: The ad features a vibrant purple background with a mix of text and abstract shapes.
global.main_message: Encouraging users to save with confidence and try the service for free.

elements.label: EarnPath logo
elements.description: A simple logo featuring the text 'EarnPath' in a bold font, positioned at the top left corner against a purple background.

elements.label: Abstract shapes
elements.description: A large purple square with a smaller circle and rectangle overlapping, creating an abstract design in the center of the ad.

elements.label: Confidence message
elements.description: Text in a clean, modern font stating 'Save with confidence' positioned prominently in the center of the ad.

elements.label: Peace of mind
elements.description: A smaller line of text below the main message that reads 'Built for peace of mind', maintaining a consistent font style.

elements.label: Call to action
elements.description: A rounded button at the bottom of the ad with the text 'Try for free' in a contrasting color, inviting user interaction.

elements.label: Purple background
elements.description: A solid purple background that fills the entire ad space, providing a vibrant backdrop for the other elements.
elements.text_content: Save with confidence Built for peace of mind

elements.label: Free trial button
elements.description: A small button at the bottom with the text 'Try for free', designed to stand out against the background.

elements.label: EarnPath logo
elements.description: The logo 'EarnPath' appears again in a smaller size at the top left corner, reinforcing brand identity.

embedding_texts.global_text: unknown, unknown, banner, modern minimalist with bold colors, EarnPath logo, call to action
embedding_texts.layout_text: The logo is at the top left, the main message is centered, and the call to action is at the bottom.
embedding_texts.ocr_text: EarnPath, Save with confidence, Built for peace of mind, Try for free
